title: Code and/or steps used in Horowitz et al. to run association analysis in REGENIE, estimate continental ancestry and analyze RNA-seq data for ACE2.
author: Marcketta, Anthony
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Scripts or steps used in Horowitz et al. 2021* to: (i) perform GWAS with REGENIE; (ii) analyze RNA-seq data for ACE2; and (iii) estimate continental ancestries. 

 *Genome-wide analysis provides genetic evidence that ACE2 expression influences COVID-19 risk and yields risk scores associated with severe disease. Nature Genetics (in press)
steps_raw:
Scripts or steps used in Horowitz et al. 2021* to: (i) perform GWAS with REGENIE; (ii) analyze RNA-seq data for ACE2; and (iii) estimate continental ancestries. 

 *Genome-wide analysis provides genetic evidence that ACE2 expression influences COVID-19 risk and yields risk scores associated with severe disease. Nature Genetics (in press)
